question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list the main chapters or sections of the thesis (e.g., Literature Review, Methodology, Implementation, Results). It only includes the problem statement and a project timeline. You should add a paragraph outlining what each chapter of your thesis will cover.

feedback: The text lacks descriptions of the thesis contents. While the 'Problem Statement' describes the research motivation, there is no description of the actual work or chapters to be performed. You need to briefly explain what each planned chapter will contain.
